topic: Gemini 3.1 Ultra API Developer Guide: 2M Context Window

key_points: Gemini 3.1 Ultra offers a 2 million token context window, largest among commercial LLMs
Supports multimodal inputs including text, images, audio, and video
Enhanced reasoning capabilities with 128K output limit per request
Optimized for complex tasks like code generation, document analysis, and long-form content
Announced February 2026 with significant improvements over Gemini 2.0
2M context window reduces need for document chunking and RAG complexity
Priced competitively at $25 per million input tokens, $100 per million output tokens
Includes new function calling and structured output features
Google positions Gemini 3.1 Ultra as enterprise-ready with SOC 2 compliance
Performance benchmarks show 92% accuracy on MMLU-Pro and 89% on HumanEval+
Supports streaming responses and parallel function calling
Available in Google AI Studio and Vertex AI platforms
Direct competitor to OpenAI GPT-5 with larger context window
Supports 20+ file formats for document processing
Includes native Google Search integration option
Enterprise features include data residency controls and audit logs
Comparative analysis of API pricing, latency, and throughput
Gemini 3.1 Ultra has best cost-performance ratio for large context tasks
Review of Python SDK and JavaScript client libraries
Implementation examples for document processing pipelines

stats.fact: 2 million token context window - largest commercial LLM context as of 2026
$25 per million input tokens, $100 per million output tokens - competitive pricing
92% accuracy on MMLU-Pro benchmark, surpassing GPT-5's 90%
Supports 20+ file formats including PDF, DOCX, PPTX, images, audio
Latency under 2 seconds for 2K token responses in US regions
Enterprise adoption grew 300% in Q1 2026 compared to Gemini 2.0
40% reduction in RAG complexity for document-heavy applications
